title: Conditional Message Display
short_description: Implement the logic to toggle authentication state and display the appropriate message.
description: In this challenge, you'll implement the logic to toggle a user's login status. You will be given a user interface with two messages: one welcoming authenticated users and another inviting users to sign in or register.
Your task is to ensure that clicking a button dynamically changes the authentication state and only displays the appropriate message based on the current status.

objectives.data: Display only the message that corresponds to the authentication state.
Toggle the authentication state when clicking the button.
